title: Battle of Sarapin (disambiguation)
content:
Several different battles involve Sarapin.
==Canon==
*The '''[[Battle at Sarapin]]''' was a [[fleet]] battle at [[Sarapin]] involving the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Riot Squadron]].

==Legends==
*The '''[[Assault on Sarapin]]''' during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] was the capture of [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]] by [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] general [[Sev'rance Tann/Legends|Sev'rance Tann]].
*The '''[[Recapture of Sarapin]]''' during the Clone Wars was the recapture of Sarapin by [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] general [[Echuu Shen-Jon]].
*The last known '''[[Battle of Sarapin (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Sarapin]]''' was the destruction of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] commander [[Brenn Tantor]].
{{Disambig}}
